query: double exposure ghostly silhouette overlapping portrait
message: sub:double_exposure — anti_aesthetic — overlapping ghostly portraits, doubled silhouettes, layered composites

response.objective_caption: A close-up side-profile portrait of a person's head and shoulder silhouetted against a warm, glowing background. The figure faces left with features obscured by shadow. Behind the subject, soft curved shapes suggest an interior space with rounded architectural elements or furniture. The palette consists of deep amber, gold, and near-black tones.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred, grainy close-up side-profile portrait of a person's head and shoulder, rendered almost as a dark silhouette with features lost to shadow and extreme underexposure. The figure faces left against a warm amber background that bleeds into glowing halos and distorted curved shapes, suggesting an interior viewed through soft-focus or motion-blurred optics. Dense film grain and smeared detail create a suffocating, melancholic atmosphere where forms dissolve into muted gold and black. The image conveys unease through its crushed shadows, oppressive low contrast, and dreamlike degradation of the subject into near-abstraction.
